weak_aliases.reason: The ACE dataset uses '+' suffix as its internal convention for SBS routes; B46+ is the ACE dataset label for the B46-SBS (Utica Avenue Select Bus Service) route.

suggested_rules: When an ACE/ABLE dataset uses a '+' suffix on a route number (e.g., B46+), and other MTA sources use '-SBS' for the same base route on the same corridor, treat '+' as equivalent to '-SBS' for identity merging purposes.
suggestion.rationale: Both records refer to the B46 Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue in Brooklyn. The ACE dataset dictionary uses 'B46+' as its internal naming convention for SBS routes (same pattern as B44+, M15+, BX12+, Q44+, BX41+, etc. which are all SBS routes). The MTA Automated Camera Enforcement page explicitly lists 'B46-SBS, Utica Av / Malcolm X Blvd' as an ACE route, confirming B46-SBS is the official name. The route_utica-ave-sbs record has richer payload (borough, streets, description, program) that complements the sparse route_b46-plus record. The variant mismatch is merely a labeling convention difference ('+' vs '-SBS'), not a genuine route variant distinction.
